subcodes.first_line: As to the means of attaining unto a goodly end, one must shun pride and vainglory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امّا وسائل وصول بحسن خاتمه این ست که باید از عجب و کبر احتراز
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
